title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, reflects on building two unicorns over 12 years. He emphasizes that competitive advantage came from focused execution and solving a real problem his own team faced information retrieval rather than pursuing larger models or better fundraising decks. His core rule across both ventures was to avoid duplicating what competitors were already doing well.
